service_details.name: SaaS Pricing Intelligence API
service_details.description: AI-powered pricing intelligence for SaaS products - analyzes market data, competitor pricing, and customer segments to recommend optimal pricing strategies
service_details.target_market: SaaS founders, product managers, pricing strategists
service_details.value_proposition: Data-driven pricing recommendations that increase MRR by 10-25%

deployment.deployment_instructions: Deploy via Render Dashboard or Railway. See DEPLOYMENT.md for steps. Requires: (1) Render/Railway account, (2) Stripe account for payment links
deployment.notes: Replace test Stripe links in landing.html with real payment links from Stripe Dashboard. Run verify_deployment.sh after deployment. API verified working locally.
